content: The hard capacity limit on agent working memory that impairs reasoning can be framed as a feature, not a bug, that can be leveraged to drive SOTA curiosity-guided active learning for long-horizon episodic memory systems in 2024-2025 agent designs. When working memory fills up, the agent is forced to prioritize encoding underutilized, unprocessed recent experiences into long-term episodic memory, intrinsically motivating it to actively seek out new information that fills gaps in its world model.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
